proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_sotorasib.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_osimertinib.

analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab vs not: n_on=25008, n_off=24992, mean_on=3.414, mean_off=3.449, delta=-0.035, p=8.11e-02. No meaningful main effect.
Sotorasib vs not: n_on=17544, n_off=32456, mean_on=3.641, mean_off=3.319, delta=0.322, p=5.62e-49. Strong positive marginal effect (~0.32 mo).
Olaparib vs not: n_on=14999, n_off=35001, mean_on=3.414, mean_off=3.439, delta=-0.025, p=2.56e-01. No main effect.
Osimertinib vs not: n_on=14976, n_off=35024, mean_on=3.434, mean_off=3.431, delta=0.004, p=8.70e-01. No main effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: egfr_mutation positive patients have different mean pfs_months than egfr_mutation negative patients.
kras_g12c positive patients have different mean pfs_months than kras_g12c negative patients.
alk_fusion positive patients have different mean pfs_months than alk_fusion negative patients.
stk11_mutation positive patients have lower mean pfs_months than stk11_mutation negative patients.
brca2_mutation positive patients have different mean pfs_months than brca2_mutation negative patients.
tmb_high patients have higher mean pfs_months than tmb_high=0 patients.
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher pfs_months (positive slope).

analyses.result_summary: biomarker_egfr_mutation: n_on=6517, n_off=43483, mean_on=3.596, mean_off=3.407, delta=0.189, p=6.48e-11
biomarker_kras_g12c: n_on=6368, n_off=43632, mean_on=4.114, mean_off=3.332, delta=0.782, p=7.36e-94
biomarker_alk_fusion: n_on=2464, n_off=47536, mean_on=2.661, mean_off=3.472, delta=-0.810, p=5.61e-66
biomarker_stk11_mutation: n_on=7451, n_off=42549, mean_on=3.439, mean_off=3.430, delta=0.009, p=7.41e-01
biomarker_brca2_mutation: n_on=1519, n_off=48481, mean_on=3.316, mean_off=3.435, delta=-0.119, p=3.12e-02
biomarker_tmb_high: n_on=14258, n_off=35742, mean_on=3.296, mean_off=3.486, delta=-0.190, p=1.04e-17
PDL1 slope coef=0.067, p=1.57e-01. Marginal slope is small and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (higher age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have different mean pfs_months than male patients.
Squamous histology patients have shorter mean pfs_months than adenocarcinoma patients.
Current smokers have shorter mean pfs_months than non-current smokers.
Never smokers have higher mean pfs_months than ever smokers.

analyses.result_summary: Age slope coef=0.170, p=0.00e+00. Surprisingly POSITIVE in this dataset.
Female vs male: n_on=22371, n_off=27629, mean_on=3.319, mean_off=3.523, delta=-0.204, p=7.70e-25. Females have ~0.20 months shorter PFS.
Squamous vs adeno: n_on=13901, n_off=36099, mean_on=2.813, mean_off=3.670, delta=-0.857, p=0.00e+00. Squamous have ~0.86 mo shorter PFS.
Current smoker vs not: n_on=14974, n_off=35026, mean_on=2.987, mean_off=3.621, delta=-0.634, p=8.37e-185. ~0.63 mo shorter PFS.
Never vs ever: n_on=7459, n_off=42541, mean_on=3.675, mean_off=3.389, delta=0.286, p=2.62e-26. ~0.29 mo longer PFS for never smokers.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
stage_iv=1 patients have shorter mean pfs_months than stage_iv=0 patients.
has_brain_mets=1 patients have shorter mean pfs_months than has_brain_mets=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: ECOG slope coef=-1.099, p=0.00e+00. Each unit ECOG = ~1.1 mo shorter PFS.
Stage IV vs not: n_on=32365, n_off=17635, mean_on=2.925, mean_off=4.362, delta=-1.438, p=0.00e+00. Stage IV ~1.4 mo shorter.
Brain mets vs not: n_on=12584, n_off=37416, mean_on=2.743, mean_off=3.663, delta=-0.921, p=0.00e+00. Brain mets ~0.92 mo shorter.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Other labs (hemoglobin, alk_phos, AST, ALT, bilirubin, creatinine, BUN, sodium, potassium, calcium) have small/null associations with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: lab_albumin_g_dl: coef=0.4411, p=2.80e-109
lab_ldh_u_l: coef=-0.0005, p=3.55e-05
lab_weight_loss_pct_6mo: coef=-0.0733, p=7.48e-179
lab_crp_mg_l: coef=0.0003, p=7.76e-01
lab_nlr: coef=0.0039, p=4.16e-01

lab_hemoglobin_g_dl: coef=-0.0018 p=7.46e-01; lab_alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: coef=-0.0003 p=1.44e-01; lab_ast_u_l: coef=0.0003 p=7.02e-01; lab_alt_u_l: coef=-0.0011 p=1.99e-01; lab_total_bilirubin_mg_dl: coef=-0.0263 p=4.06e-01; lab_creatinine_mg_dl: coef=-0.0413 p=2.18e-01; lab_bun_mg_dl: coef=-0.0013 p=5.14e-01; lab_sodium_meq_l: coef=0.0024 p=4.78e-01; lab_potassium_meq_l: coef=0.0193 p=3.32e-01; lab_calcium_mg_dl: coef=-0.0211 p=2.89e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is greater (more positive) in pdl1_tps high patients than in pdl1_tps low patients (positive treatment x pdl1_tps interaction).
The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is greater in tmb_high patients than in tmb_high=0 patients (positive treatment x tmb_high interaction).
The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is suppressed in stk11_mutation positive patients (negative treatment x stk11_mutation interaction).
The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is greater in non-squamous adenocarcinoma patients (negative treatment x squamous interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef=-0.116, p=2.17e-01. No significant pembro x PDL1 modulation.
Interaction coef=-0.018, p=6.85e-01. No pembro x TMB-H modulation.
Interaction coef=-0.016, p=7.73e-01. No pembro x STK11 modulation.
Interaction coef=-0.060, p=1.69e-01. No significant histology modulation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_osimertinib effect on pfs_months is greater in egfr_mutation positive patients than in egfr_mutation negative patients (positive treatment x egfr_mutation interaction).
The treatment_osimertinib effect on pfs_months differs by alk_fusion status.
The treatment_osimertinib effect on pfs_months differs by has_brain_mets status.

analyses.result_summary: Osi x EGFR interaction coef=-0.020, p=7.58e-01. Strikingly NO osi-EGFR interaction.
Osi x ALK interaction coef=0.238, p=1.72e-02. Borderline.

analyses.code: sub_effect osimertinib in EGFR+ stratified by brain mets
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+/brain: delta=0.051, p=6.39e-01. EGFR+/no_brain: delta=-0.029, p=6.64e-01. No osi effect in either stratum.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months is greater in kras_g12c positive patients than in kras_g12c negative patients (positive treatment x kras_g12c interaction).
In kras_g12c positive patients, sotorasib increases pfs_months versus no sotorasib.
In kras_g12c negative patients, sotorasib has no measurable pfs_months effect.

analyses.result_summary: Sot x KRAS interaction coef=2.558, p=0.00e+00. Very large positive interaction; sotorasib benefit concentrated in KRAS+ patients.

analyses.code: ttest pfs[sot==1 & kras==1] vs pfs[sot==0 & kras==1]
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+ subgroup: n_on=2246, n_off=4122, mean_on=5.766, mean_off=3.213, delta=2.552, p=1.66e-202. Sotorasib +2.55 mo, p<1e-200.

analyses.code: ttest pfs[sot==1 & kras==0] vs pfs[sot==0 & kras==0]
analyses.result_summary: KRAS- subgroup: n_on=15298, n_off=28334, mean_on=3.329, mean_off=3.334, delta=-0.005, p=7.99e-01. No sotorasib effect (delta near zero).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_olaparib effect on pfs_months is greater in brca2_mutation positive patients than in brca2_mutation negative patients (positive treatment x brca2_mutation interaction).
In brca2_mutation positive patients, olaparib increases pfs_months versus no olaparib.

analyses.result_summary: Olap x BRCA2 interaction coef=0.037, p=7.78e-01. NO interaction.

analyses.code: ttest pfs[olap==1 & brca2==1] vs pfs[olap==0 & brca2==1]
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ subgroup: n_on=417, n_off=1102, mean_on=3.324, mean_off=3.314, delta=0.010, p=9.34e-01. No olaparib effect even in BRCA2+ patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In pdl1_tps>=0.5 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months versus no pembrolizumab.
In tmb_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months versus no pembrolizumab.
In pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months versus no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: PDL1>=50%: n_on=5342, n_off=5407, mean_on=3.407, mean_off=3.477, delta=-0.070, p=1.06e-01. No pembro benefit.
TMB-H: n_on=7111, n_off=7147, mean_on=3.272, mean_off=3.320, delta=-0.048, p=2.00e-01. No pembro benefit.

analyses.code: ttest pembro effect within PDL1>=50% AND TMB-H
analyses.result_summary: PDL1>=50%/TMB-H: n_on=1590, n_off=1560, mean_on=3.331, mean_off=3.248, delta=0.083, p=3.04e-01. Still no pembro benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In stk11_mutation positive patients, treatment_pembrolizumab has lower (more negative) effect on pfs_months than in stk11_mutation negative patients.
In pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND stk11_mutation=0 (clean PDL1-high) patients, treatment_pembrolizumab increases pfs_months versus no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: STK11+: delta=-0.049,p=3.37e-01. STK11-: delta=-0.032,p=1.36e-01. No real difference.
PDL1>=50/STK11-: n_on=4552, n_off=4597, mean_on=3.402, mean_off=3.497, delta=-0.095, p=4.36e-02. Borderline negative direction (-0.095, p=0.04) — direction opposite to expected, n=4552/4597.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 AND stk11_mutation=0 patients, sotorasib has a larger pfs_months effect than in kras_g12c=1 AND stk11_mutation=1 patients (negative sotorasib x stk11 interaction within KRAS+).

analyses.code: ttest sot in KRAS+/STK11- vs KRAS+/STK11+
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+/STK11-: delta=2.587, p=3.22e-179 (n_on=1959). KRAS+/STK11+: delta=2.326, p=3.60e-25 (n_on=287). Sotorasib effect is large in BOTH; STK11 does not suppress sotorasib here.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients on treatment_pembrolizumab only (no other treatment), mean pfs_months is higher than in patients on no treatment.
In patients on treatment_sotorasib only (no other treatment), mean pfs_months is higher than in patients on no treatment.
In patients on treatment_olaparib only (no other treatment), mean pfs_months is higher than in patients on no treatment.
In patients on treatment_osimertinib only (no other treatment), mean pfs_months is higher than in patients on no treatment.

analyses.result_summary: monothx_pembro_vs_none: n_on=8030, n_off=7903, mean_on=3.318, mean_off=3.338, delta=-0.020, p=5.43e-01
monothx_sot_vs_none: n_on=4304, n_off=7903, mean_on=3.677, mean_off=3.338, delta=0.339, p=2.19e-14
monothx_olap_vs_none: n_on=3382, n_off=7903, mean_on=3.277, mean_off=3.338, delta=-0.061, p=1.61e-01
monothx_osi_vs_none: n_on=3374, n_off=7903, mean_on=3.337, mean_off=3.338, delta=-0.001, p=9.78e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all features in a multivariable OLS, ecog_ps remains a strong negative predictor of pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_sotorasib has a positive coefficient on pfs_months while treatment_pembrolizumab/olaparib/osimertinib are near zero.
After adjustment, age_years has a positive coefficient on pfs_months in this dataset (counter-clinical-intuition).

analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps coef=-1.101, p=0.00e+00
age coef=0.1684, p=0.00e+00. Confirmed positive (counter-intuitive).

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one feature among {age_years, sex_female, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, all biomarkers, all labs} significantly modifies the treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months at p<0.05.
The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is more positive in patients with greater weight_loss_pct_6mo (positive treatment x weight_loss interaction).
The treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months differs between stage_iv and non-stage_iv patients (positive treatment x stage_iv interaction).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ pembro + mod + pembro:mod for each feature
analyses.result_summary: Top interactions by p: weight_loss_pct_6mo (coef=0.018, p=3.15e-04), stage_iv (coef=0.108, p=6.77e-03), kras_g12c (coef=-0.113, p=5.65e-02), ldh_u_l (coef=0.000, p=6.27e-02), bun_mg_dl (coef=-0.007, p=7.07e-02)
Pembro x weight_loss interaction coef=0.0184, p=3.15e-04. Significant but small.
Pembro x stage_iv interaction coef=0.1077, p=6.77e-03.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one feature among {all biomarkers, demographics, labs} significantly modifies the treatment_osimertinib effect on pfs_months at p<0.05.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ osi + mod + osi:mod for each feature
analyses.result_summary: Top osi interactions by p: alk_fusion (coef=0.238, p=1.72e-02), brca2_mutation (coef=-0.254, p=4.96e-02), potassium_meq_l (coef=0.056, p=1.98e-01), crp_mg_l (coef=0.003, p=2.03e-01), hemoglobin_g_dl (coef=-0.013, p=2.76e-01). None robust; alk_fusion p=0.017 with small n is weak.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one feature beyond kras_g12c significantly modifies the treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months at p<0.05.
The treatment_sotorasib effect on pfs_months is greater in male (sex_female=0) than in female (sex_female=1) patients (negative treatment x sex_female interaction, marginally).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ sot + mod + sot:mod for each feature
analyses.result_summary: Top sot interactions by p: kras_g12c (coef=2.558, p=0.00e+00), sex_female (coef=-0.562, p=5.30e-41), alk_fusion (coef=-0.488, p=4.13e-07), egfr_mutation (coef=-0.241, p=9.93e-05), brca2_mutation (coef=-0.334, p=6.07e-03), age_years (coef=0.003, p=1.01e-02)
Sot x sex_female interaction coef=-0.562, p=5.30e-41. Sotorasib benefit reduced in females.

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one feature significantly modifies the treatment_olaparib effect on pfs_months at p<0.05.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ olap + mod + olap:mod for each feature
analyses.result_summary: Top olap interactions by p: bun_mg_dl (coef=0.011, p=1.36e-02), crp_mg_l (coef=0.006, p=2.15e-02), creatinine_mg_dl (coef=0.136, p=6.26e-02), stk11_mutation (coef=0.110, p=7.28e-02), age_years (coef=0.002, p=1.32e-01). None survives multiple-testing correction; no clean modifier.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 patients, sotorasib increases pfs_months in MALE (sex_female=0) patients but has no effect in FEMALE (sex_female=1) patients.
Within kras_g12c=1, the sotorasib pfs_months benefit is similar across smoking_status, ecog_ps, histology, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, pdl1_tps, tmb_high, and stk11_mutation status.
Within kras_g12c=1, the sotorasib pfs_months benefit is attenuated in alk_fusion=1 or brca2_mutation=1 patients (very small subgroups).

analyses.code: ttest sot in KRAS+/male vs KRAS+/female
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+/male: n_on=1237,n_off=2271,delta=4.644,p=0.00e+00. KRAS+/female: delta=-0.012,p=8.84e-01.

analyses.code: sub_effect sotorasib in KRAS+ stratified by each variable
analyses.result_summary: smoke_current: d=2.47,p=1.1e-93 | smoke_former: d=2.66,p=5.0e-111 | smoke_never: d=1.76,p=6.6e-04 | ecog0: d=2.47,p=5.5e-70 | ecog1: d=2.64,p=9.2e-109 | ecog2: d=2.49,p=2.8e-38 | adeno: d=2.62,p=3.0e-139 | squam: d=2.50,p=4.2e-72 | stage4: d=2.51,p=2.9e-136 | nonstage4: d=2.61,p=2.5e-76 | brain: d=2.33,p=9.0e-47 | nobrain: d=2.63,p=1.1e-161 | pdl1high: d=2.62,p=6.1e-48 | pdl1low: d=2.53,p=2.1e-156 | tmb_high: d=2.51,p=2.3e-66 | tmb_low: d=2.57,p=9.2e-138 | stk11_mutation_pos: d=2.33,p=3.6e-25 | stk11_mutation_neg: d=2.59,p=3.2e-179. All deltas ~+2.3 to +2.7 with p<<0.001 — uniform benefit across these strata.

analyses.code: sub_effect sotorasib in KRAS+/ALK+ and KRAS+/BRCA2+
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+/ALK+: delta=-0.349,p=2.25e-01. KRAS+/BRCA2+: delta=0.078,p=8.20e-01. Both very small subgroups (n_on~66-87); attenuation likely sample-size noise rather than mechanism.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In egfr_mutation=1 patients, treatment_osimertinib has no detectable pfs_months benefit in any single-feature subgroup (sex, smoking, brain mets, ECOG, histology).
In brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib has no detectable pfs_months benefit in any subgroup (sex, ECOG, histology, albumin).

analyses.result_summary: male: d=-0.041,p=8.1e-01 | female: d=0.065,p=7.2e-01 | ecog0: d=-0.137,p=5.2e-01 | ecog1: d=0.261,p=1.1e-01 | ecog2: d=-0.189,p=5.1e-01 | adeno: d=0.053,p=7.1e-01 | alb_high: d=0.063,p=7.2e-01 | female_alb_hi: d=0.006,p=9.8e-01. No detectable olaparib benefit in any subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with no actionable driver (egfr_mutation=0 AND alk_fusion=0 AND kras_g12c=0 AND brca2_mutation=0), treatment_pembrolizumab has no pfs_months benefit.
Splitting by sex_female, treatment_pembrolizumab has no pfs_months benefit in male or female patients.
Splitting by ecog_ps, treatment_pembrolizumab has no pfs_months benefit at any ECOG level.

analyses.code: ttest pembro in patients with no actionable driver
analyses.result_summary: No-driver: n_on=17339, n_off=17371, mean_on=3.313, mean_off=3.343, delta=-0.030, p=1.84e-01
Male: delta=-0.044,p=1.19e-01. Female: delta=-0.024,p=3.99e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within kras_g12c=1, the treatment_sotorasib x sex_female interaction is strongly negative (i.e. sotorasib effect is much smaller in females).
Within kras_g12c=1, the sotorasib effect is captured fully by sex_female; no additional 3-way interaction with stk11_mutation is significant.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ sot + sex_female + sot:sex_female within KRAS_G12C+
analyses.result_summary: Within KRAS+: sotorasib main effect coef=4.644 (p=0.00e+00); sot x sex_female interaction coef=-4.656 (p=0.00e+00). Interaction nearly cancels the main effect — sotorasib benefit is essentially male-only.

analyses.code: OLS within KRAS+ with sot, sex_female, stk11 and all 2-way and 3-way interactions
analyses.result_summary: sot coef=4.669(p=0.00e+00); sot:sex_female=-4.689(p=2.04e-276); sot:stk11=-0.182(p=4.37e-01); sot:sex:stk11=0.235(p=4.90e-01). Only sot:sex_female is significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 AND alk_fusion=0 AND brca2_mutation=0 patients (clean KRAS+ male), treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months by approximately 5 months (large effect, p<<0.001).
In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1 patients, treatment_sotorasib has no measurable pfs_months effect (delta ~ 0, p>0.5).

analyses.result_summary: KRAS+/male/ALK-/BRCA2- (n_on=1154,n_off=2112): mean_on=8.234, mean_off=3.249, delta=4.985, p=0.00e+00. Effect ~+5 months.
KRAS+/female (n_on=1009,n_off=1851): delta=-0.012, p=8.84e-01. No effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months by ~+4.6 to +5.0 months only in patients who are kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0; in all other patients (kras_g12c=0 of any sex, or kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1) sotorasib has no detectable pfs_months effect (delta < 0.05, p > 0.5).

FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab has no detectable positive pfs_months effect in any tested subgroup, including pdl1_tps>=0.5, tmb_high=1, the joint pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high=1, no-actionable-driver, or stk11-stratified subgroups.
FINAL: treatment_olaparib has no detectable positive pfs_months effect in any tested subgroup, including brca2_mutation=1 alone or jointly with sex/ECOG/albumin.
FINAL: treatment_osimertinib has no detectable positive pfs_months effect in any tested subgroup, including egfr_mutation=1 alone or jointly with sex/ECOG/brain mets/STK11/smoking.

analyses.code: Combined ttests: sot in KRAS+/male, KRAS+/female, KRAS-
analyses.result_summary: KRAS+/male: delta=4.644, p=0.00e+00, n_on=1237,n_off=2271. KRAS+/female: delta=-0.012, p=8.84e-01. KRAS-: delta=-0.005, p=7.99e-01. Sotorasib benefit is restricted to KRAS+ MALE.

analyses.code: Combined ttests for pembro across plausible benefit subgroups
analyses.result_summary: PDL1>=50%: delta=-0.070,p=1.06e-01. TMB-H: delta=-0.048,p=2.00e-01. PDL1>=50/TMB-H: delta=0.083,p=3.04e-01. No-driver: delta=-0.030,p=1.84e-01. None positive.

analyses.code: Combined ttests for olaparib in BRCA2+
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+: delta=0.010,p=9.34e-01,n_on=417,n_off=1102. BRCA2+/alb-high: delta=0.063,p=7.22e-01. No positive subgroup.

analyses.code: Combined ttests for osimertinib in EGFR+
analyses.result_summary: EGFR+: delta=-0.014,p=8.08e-01,n_on=1973,n_off=4544. EGFR+/brain: delta=0.051,p=6.39e-01. No positive subgroup.
